name: Ginza Luxury Hotel Suite (Previous Night Flashback)
location: High-end hotel suite in Ginza district, Tokyo, Japan
layout: Compact and refined suite space featuring a king-sized bed centered against one wall, heavy drapes framing floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the city, a plush carpeted floor, side tables with glassware, and metallic lamps; the room includes a small seating area with armchair and low table, maintaining a dense layering of furnishings for intimate scale
materials: Thick velvet curtains in deep navy, crisp white cotton bedsheets with subtle folds, soft woolen carpet with intricate geometric patterns, crystal glass tumblers and decanters on polished wooden surfaces, brushed stainless steel lamp fixtures, and marble accents on side tables
lighting: Cool blue-toned light filtering through semi-sheer inner curtains from city nightscape outside, contrasted by warm amber glow from bedside metallic lamps casting soft shadows on textured surfaces
atmosphere: Dense indoor layering with subtle reflections on glass and metallic elements, clear textures on fabric pleats and carpet weaves, evoking a mix of perfumed air, faint alcohol residue, and crisp air-conditioned chill in a suspenseful urban hotel setting
establishing_prompt: Empty luxury hotel suite in modern Ginza, Tokyo at night: king bed with rumpled white sheets, heavy navy velvet curtains partially drawn over floor-to-ceiling windows showing faint city lights, plush geometric carpet, glass tumblers on wooden side table, metallic bedside lamps softly illuminated, marble accents, cool blue window light mixing with warm amber lamp glow, high-density refined furnishings, realistic cinematic urban hotel texture, no people
